text:
BOTTOM LINE — Narrow risk-off grind, large caps held, semis distributed.
SPY -0.15%, QQQ -0.85%, IWM -0.97% all down. VIX 18.0 flat. DIA best at +0.16%, IWM worst at -0.97%. Large > small by 0.82pp. USO +4.07% most notable cross-asset.

INDICES — VIX 18.0 flat vs 20d MA 18.1. DIA +0.16%, SPY -0.15%, QQQ -0.85%, IWM -0.97%.

VOLUME — Elevated volume in DIA 1.7x, SLV 1.3x, XLK 1.5x, XLU 1.4x, XLP 1.4x gaining attention. SPY vol_ratio 1.0x, QQQ vol_ratio implicit in XLK 1.5x. Declining XLE 0.9x, XLI 0.8x, XLY 0.8x ignored; vol up + price down in XLK signals tech distribution.

SECTORS — XLV Healthcare +1.96%, XLP Staples +1.28%, XLF Financials +0.78%, XLE Energy +0.70%, XLC Comms +0.24%, XLU Utilities +0.11%, XLRE Real Estate +0.02%, XLB Materials -0.23%, XLI Industrials -0.39%, XLY Discretionary -0.90%, XLK Technology -1.51%. Top industries IHI +2.42%, CPER +2.67%; bottom SOXX -3.15%, URA -5.03%.

THE 7s — Medtech +2.13% (strongest IHI, weakest split), Health +1.65% (strongest PPH), Defense +1.60% (strongest HII), Old Staples +1.41%, Energy +0.90%; Freight -0.73%, Industrial -0.78%, Housing -0.85%, Cloud -1.58%, Semi -3.81% (strongest INTC -10%, weakest QCOM -10.7%).

FED & LIQUIDITY — Next FOMC Jun 17, CME hold 100%. Stance Hawk 6 (Cook, Hammack, Kashkari, Logan, Barkin, Goolsbee), Neutral 5 (Powell, Williams, Barr, Jefferson, Paulson), Dove 4 (Bowman, Miran, Waller, Daly). USD liquidity 28/100 normal, Reserve Scarcity 85th percentile most stressed; TED 0.09%.

POSITIONING — SPY PCR_vol 2.04 elevated protection, skew +8.1% fear; spot 7412 below GEX flip 746. QQQ PCR_vol 1.60 elevated, skew +10.4%, spot below GEX 645. VIX 18.0 below 20d MA 18.1 complacency.

CROSS-ASSET — USO +4.07% lifted XLE +0.70% despite prior de-escalation; semis SOXX -3.15% dragged XLK -1.51% on cooling AI trade.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed 60.9 Greed. Top movers USO +4.07% energy, CPER +2.67% metals, IHI +2.42% medtech. 20d momentum XLK +18.43% best sector, Semi +43.33% best basket, XLU -2.75% worst sector, Medtech -13.74% worst basket. Vol spike CPER 2.2x +2.67% accumulation.

WATCH — CPER +2.67% vol 2.2x spike. HII in Defense +1.60% Q1 EPS beat. SOXX -3.15% semi distribution near momentum peak.
